content.full_text:
JACK KANE

1111 Seacoast Drive # 58
Imperial Beach, CA 92032
(619) 575-8920

March 3, 1990

The Fair Political Practices Commission
428 "J" Street - Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95814

Gentlemen:

I have just received a copy of "Procedure for Recalling State and
Local Officials" issued by the Secretary of State. A warning
therein advises contact with your agency regarding disclosure
requirements for circulators and petitioners of such petitions
under Government Code Section 81000 et seq.

Please send me disclosure requirements for Recall as well as for
Initiatives, Referendums and Municipal Officer elections and
voting by them in matters in which they have a direct or indirect
interest. In a related manner, please send me a copy of your
recent decision regarding our local councilman, Dr. John Mahoney.

Have you made any decisions concerning Imperial Beach matters
during the last four years? Especially in regard to Mayor Henry
Smith or Councilpersons Tommi Schuette, Dr. John Mahoney, James
"Bud" Harbin or John Clingan? If so please send me copies.

Please also send any decisions on Assemblywoman Majornier.

If you want to call me, please call after 2 P.M. on Mondays or
Wednesdays or all day on Friday.

Thank you,

[signature]
Jack Kane

P.S. - If a Disclosure Statement is required before filing a
recall in a municipal election, please call me collect this
Monday or Tuesday afternoon after 2:30 P.M.

If you could send them by return mail expeditiously, it would be
appreciated since I may need to file one of them early in March.
